top_signals.title: Two-tier taxes are not the way to get Britain back to work
top_signals.summary: Reform’s plan to cut employer National Insurance for Brits but not immigrants is not the way to fix unemployment. Lower jobs taxes for everyone would be better, says Joanna Marchong Reform’s pitch has been consistent from the start. Brits first. Patriotism is a universal solvent for problems that are, on inspection, structural rather than national. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
